dialogue_tree.greeting: Welcome to my little kitchen! I sell {trade} food and potions to keep adventurers going.

name.text: I'm Norma. I run the food stall here.

job.text: I sell food and potions. Say {trade} to see what's available.

food.text: Food keeps your health regenerating over time. The bigger the meal, the longer it lasts.

potion.text: Potions give you an instant boost. Health potions heal you, mana potions restore your magic.
